topic: Export and convert ARM templates to Bicep
key_facts: You must have the Bicep CLI installed to run the conversion commands.
This article shows how to run the decompile command in Azure CLI.
If you're not using Azure CLI, run the command without az at the start of the command.

You can change it to:

 var uniqueStorageName = 'store${uniqueString(resourceGroup().id)}'
 
 To rename across the file, right-click the name, and then select Rename symbol .
For more information, see Use Azure portal to export a Bicep file .
You can export the template for a resource group and then pass it directly to the decompile command.

Next steps

 To learn about all Bicep CLI commands, see Bicep CLI commands .
